research_note.summary: The admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro second-source source-span precision pilot completed one non-streaming call on the operator-approved box-trades excerpt and benchmark. The narrowed source-span contract produced complete parseable proposal-only JSON, but this is not a method-quality or repeatability conclusion until manual content review.
what_worked: DeepSeek V4 Pro with thinking disabled produced output in one admitted non-streaming second-source source-span precision batch.
The source-span precision contract fit within the tiny pilot cap and returned all four expected top-level sections.
The selected second-source excerpt, prompt trace, provider request/response, and model trace remained in ignored local paths.
The committed records can carry model, prompt, source-hash, token, cost, trace-storage, parseability, and support-label count metadata without committing raw source or provider payloads.
what_failed: No method success is claimed; method quality was not evaluated by this boundary review.
Manual content review has not yet judged whether exact or approximate source-span hints are actually warranted by the second-source excerpt.
The run intentionally omitted broad judgment abstraction and cross-method comparison prose, so those dimensions remain outside this artifact.
negative_results: A structurally complete source-span precision output is still proposal-only and does not validate trading claims or source interpretation quality.
Support hint quality labels are model proposals until manually reviewed.
A successful provider call is not validation, strategy evidence, product evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
reusable_by_other_labs: Compare this run with chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_003 only after Goal 9C manual content review.
Use explicit exact/approximate/broad/missing labels when testing source-span precision repeatability under tiny output caps.
Use proposal-only live records with explicit source hashes, prompt/config hashes, token/cost metadata, and trace-storage boundaries.
do_not_repeat: Do not treat parseable JSON or exact/approximate labels as method success before Goal 9C manual content review.
Do not expand output sections or model settings without a separate admission update.
Do not copy generated synthesis metrics or raw model text into currentness docs.
Do not substitute models silently when the admitted model is unavailable.
research_note.evidence_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
